fields.name: work_id
fields.title: PPA Work identifier
fields.description: Unique work identifier comprised of source identifier and (for excerpts) starting page number

fields.name: source_id
fields.title: Source identifier
fields.description: Work identifier from original source (HathiTrust, Gale/ECCO, or EEBO-TCP)

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Identifier used to associate individual volumes with MARC records
fields.title: Record identifier

fields.name: author
fields.title: Author
fields.description: Author name in "Last, First, lifespan (if known)" format

fields.name: title
fields.title: Title
fields.description: Title of the work

fields.name: subtitle
fields.title: Subtitle
fields.description: Subtitle of the work

fields.name: sort_title
fields.title: Sort title
fields.description: Title of the work without leading stop words

fields.name: work_type
fields.title: Work type
fields.description: Full work, Excerpt, or Article

fields.name: book_journal
fields.title: Book or journal title
fields.description: For excerpts and articles only: title of book or journal in which the excerpt or article appears

fields.name: volume
fields.title: Volume
fields.description: Book or journal volume number (if applicable)

fields.name: pub_year
fields.title: Publication year
fields.description: Year of the work's publication

fields.name: pub_place
fields.title: Publication place
fields.description: City of the work's publication

fields.name: publisher
fields.title: Publisher
fields.description: Name of the work's publisher

fields.name: pages_orig
fields.title: Pages original
fields.description: For excerpts and articles only: physical printed page numbers, used for citation purposes

fields.name: pages_digital
fields.title: Pages digital
fields.description: For excerpts and articles only: digital page numbers based on scanning sequence, used for determining the bounds of the range

fields.name: page_count
fields.title: Page count
fields.description: Total number of pages in the full work, excerpt, or article

fields.name: collections
fields.title: Collections
fields.description: Dictionaries, Linguistic, Literary, Original Bibliography, Typographically Unique, Word Lists (if multiple, separated by semicolons)

fields.name: cluster_id
fields.title: Cluster identifier
fields.description: Custom identifier to group together reprints of functionally identical works

fields.name: source
fields.title: Source
fields.description: Source provider of the work: HathiTrust, Gale/ECCO, or EEBO-TCP

fields.name: source_url
fields.title: Source URL
fields.description: URL to view the work directly on HathiTrust, Gale/EECO, or EEBO-TCP

fields.name: added
fields.description: Date added to PPA database
fields.title: Added

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Date last modified in PPA database
fields.title: Updated

fields.name: label
fields.title: Page label
fields.description: Page number in original source, if available

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Page tags if any
fields.title: Tags

fields.name: id
fields.title: Page identifier
fields.description: Unique page identifier

fields.name: order
fields.description: Page number in scanning sequence
fields.title: Page order

fields.name: text
fields.description: Full-text content of the page
fields.title: Text

fields.name: work_id
fields.description: Unique identifier used to connect pages back to the work
fields.title: Work identifier
